MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-616195 WITH CASE CGC-22-603421
Off Calendar Dec-02-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
ADAM A. CHAVEZ, ESQ., EDLIN GALLAGHER HUIE + BLUM (415) 397-9006 aachavez@eghblaw.com
Attorneys for Defendants DESERAE MONIQUE NELSON, GOOGLE LLC, and LUX LEASING LLC

Notice of contest was not received by the Court from Defendants counsel. Mr. Chaves indicates to the Court that parties filed a Joint Stipulation to continue trial date pending this Motion to Consolidate. The current trial date of December 2, 2024 has been continued to April 1, 2025 per stipulation.

Hearing is held. Discussesd, not ARGUED.

The Court vacates is tentative ruling and makes the following ruling:

DEFENDANT GOOGLE LLC, DESEAE NELSON, LUX LEASING, LLC MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-616195 WITH CASE CGC-22-603421 is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
